descrition: I am a Software Engineer and Solutions Architect with 6+ years of experience designing and building scalable, high-performance web products. My career spans from foundational frontend engineering — crafting design systems, component libraries, and SaaS dashboards — to leading full-stack architecture decisions and integrating AI-driven capabilities into real-world products. I have a strong focus on software architecture, solutions engineering, and the strategic use of Artificial Intelligence to transform complex data and business challenges into intelligent, actionable interfaces. I thrive at the intersection of robust engineering and cutting-edge innovation.
